# David Thompson — Fashion & Beauty Photographer

> David Thompson is a multi award-winning, London-based fashion and beauty photographer with over two decades of editorial and advertising experience.

## About

David Thompson grew up with a camera in his hand and has travelled the world as a specialist studio photographer. He is known for timeless, clean, beautifully lit imagery. His work is held in the permanent collection of The National Portrait Gallery, London.

## Specialisms

- High fashion editorial photography
- Beauty and cosmetics photography
- Bridal and wedding photography
- Jewellery and luxury advertising photography
- Celebrity and portrait photography

## Selected Magazine Credits

Vogue Germany, Vogue Japan, Vogue Brazil, Vogue China, Vogue Hellas, Vogue Mexico, Vogue Gioello, Vogue Italia, Myself (Condé Nast) Italy, Easy Living (Condé Nast) UK, Brides (Condé Nast) UK, The Rake (International Edition), French Marie-Claire, Spanish Marie-Claire, Japanese Marie-Claire, Italian Amica, Jalouse (France), West-East (Hong Kong), InStyle UK, The National (Dubai), Glamour Mexico, RED UK, Elle Sweden, Donna, New York Times Sunday Magazine

## Selected Client Credits

Adidas, Swarovski, L'Oreal, Wella, EMI, Hirsh Jewellery, Marks & Spencer, The White Company, Random House, Lara Bohinc, The Royal Family of Jordan

## Portfolio Series

- The Rake — menswear editorial for The Rake International Edition
- Vogue Brides — bridal fashion for Condé Nast Brides UK
- Smooth Skin — beauty and cosmetics campaign work
- The National — editorial for The National Magazine, Dubai
- Mlle Birkin — fashion editorial inspired by Jane Birkin
- Viva la Linda — high-fashion editorial
- Please Sir — fashion editorial
- Sports Day — fashion editorial

## Location

London, United Kingdom. Available for international commissions.

## Contact

- Direct UK enquiries: thompson@mail.com
